title: Boss Crosshair-4
description: Crosshair with another Shape and with Shading
body:
Enhance your gameplay with the Boss Crosshair Texture Pack! This pack modifies the shape of the crosshair and adds shading for a more immersive experience. Simple yet impactful, it's perfect for players looking to upgrade their in-game visuals.

Use the [Crosshair Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshairtweaks) mod to apply 100% opacity to the crosshair to enhance the effect!
